Log:
  Stage net-mgmt/routers2 and cleanup

   * stage support
   * use PORTDOCS (remove from pkg-plist)
   * use DOCS instead of NOPORTDOCS
   * get rid of 3 unnecessary for loops
   * properly handly /var/db/rddtool
   * Use @sample keyword
   * Use %%WWWDIR%% in pkg-plist
